sources.name: Mangalife
sources.author: best quality for completed manga (uses volumized versions rather than scans)

sources.name: Mangadex
sources.author: good for ongoing manga (mangalife usually is too, but mangadex has manga that are not on mangalife)

sources.name: Mangahub
sources.author: rare instances that a manga is not on or is updated too infrequently on mangadex or mangalife (ex: vanitas no carte)
